domain.program.name: Content Publishing
domain.intake.purpose: Score campaign assets, publish to a CMS through a mock webhook, review editorial fit, and complete.

artifacts.spec_yaml:
name: content-publishing
termination: BoundedSession
topology: CyclicTopology
pure: true
preamble: |-
  Program: Content Publishing. Score campaign assets, publish to a CMS through a mock webhook, review editorial fit, and complete.

  This spec was synthesized mechanically by pgas-new.
initial: intake
terminal:
  - complete
features:
  - base
  - runtime_control
channels:
  user_text:
    direction: In
    sync: Async
  system_mode_entry:
    direction: In
    sync: Async
  widget_output:
    direction: Out
    sync: Async
  stage_output:
    direction: Out
    sync: Sync
modes:
  intake:
    vocabulary:
      - begin_work
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - system_mode_entry
      - widget_output
    transitions:
      - target: asset_score
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: intake.started
  asset_score:
    vocabulary:
      - complete_asset_score
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - widget_output
      - stage_output
    transitions:
      - target: cms_publish
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: asset_score.ready
  cms_publish:
    vocabulary:
      - complete_cms_publish
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - widget_output
      - stage_output
    transitions:
      - target: editorial_review
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: cms_publish.ready
  editorial_review:
    vocabulary:
      - complete_editorial_review
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - widget_output
    transitions:
      - target: complete
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: editorial_review.done
  complete:
    vocabulary:
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_help
    channels:
      - widget_output
    transitions: []
proceed_to:
  begin_work: asset_score
  complete_asset_score: cms_publish
  complete_cms_publish: editorial_review
  complete_editorial_review: complete
projection:
  intake:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - intake.started
    exclude: []
  complete:
    include:
      - asset_score.ready
      - cms_publish.ready
      - editorial_review.done
      - asset_score.output
      - cms_publish.output
      - editorial_review.result_json
      - editorial_review.items_json
    exclude: []
  asset_score:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - asset_score.ready
      - asset_score.output
    exclude: []
  cms_publish:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - cms_publish.ready
      - cms_publish.output
    exclude: []
  editorial_review:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - editorial_review.done
      - editorial_review.result_json
      - editorial_review.items_json
    exclude: []
prompts:
  intake: Capture the initial request for Content Publishing and start the work.
  complete: Terminal mode after Content Publishing completion is confirmed.
  asset_score: Perform the asset_score stage for Content Publishing.
  cms_publish: Perform the cms_publish stage for Content Publishing.
  editorial_review: Perform the editorial_review stage for Content Publishing.
ingestion:
  user_text:
    - inputs.user_text
  system_mode_entry:
    - inputs.mode_entry
action_map:
  begin_work:
    description: Start intake and advance exactly one hop to asset_score.
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: intake.started
        value: true
    channel: widget_output
  record_user_note:
    description: Record a notebook note.
    mutations:
      - op: MAppend
        path: notebook.entries
        from_arg: note
    channel: widget_output
  session_new:
    description: Control-plane new session command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_abort_current:
    description: Control-plane abort current session command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_status:
    description: Control-plane status command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_history:
    description: Control-plane history command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_resume:
    description: Control-plane resume command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_help:
    description: Control-plane help command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  complete_asset_score:
    description: Run deterministic pure-compute wrapper for asset_score and advance exactly one hop to cms_publish.
    result_path: asset_score.output
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: asset_score.ready
        value: true
    channel: stage_output
  complete_cms_publish:
    description: Run deterministic external-adapter wrapper for cms_publish and advance exactly one hop to editorial_review.
    result_path: cms_publish.output
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: cms_publish.ready
        value: true
    channel: stage_output
  complete_editorial_review:
    description: Record runtime LLM reasoning output for editorial_review and advance exactly one hop to complete.
    arg_descriptions:
      result_json: JSON string result for the editorial_review LLM reasoning stage.
      items_json: JSON string array of item ids or summaries produced by the editorial_review LLM reasoning stage.
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: editorial_review.done
        value: true
      - op: MSet
        path: editorial_review.result_json
        from_arg: result_json
      - op: MSet
        path: editorial_review.items_json
        from_arg: items_json
    channel: widget_output
schema:
  inputs.user_text: string
  inputs.query_result.kind: string
  inputs.query_result.value_json: object
  inputs.query_meta.source_path: string
  inputs.query_meta.source_channel: string
  inputs.query_meta.continuation_round: number
  inputs.query_meta.scope_redirect: string
  inputs.query_meta.message: string
  inputs.mode_entry: object
  inputs.mode_entry.mode: string
  inputs.mode_entry.from_mode: string
  inputs.mode_entry.entry_round: number
  governance.round_counter: number
  notebook.entries: array
  notebook.pins: array
  intake.started: boolean
  asset_score.ready: boolean
  cms_publish.ready: boolean
  editorial_review.done: boolean
  asset_score.output: object
  asset_score.output.result_json: string
  asset_score.output.items_json: string
  asset_score.output.digest: string
  cms_publish.output: object
  cms_publish.output.result_json: string
  cms_publish.output.items_json: string
  cms_publish.output.digest: string
  cms_publish.output.adapter_kind: string
  editorial_review.result_json: string
  editorial_review.items_json: string
repair_bound: 2
fallback:
  channel: widget_output
  payload:
    ok: false
guidance:
  asset_score:
    - Use the synthesized JSON-string scalar fields for structured handler results.
    - 'delegation intake captured for this program: {"cms_publish":{"service":"cms","webhook":"mock publishing endpoint"}}.'
  cms_publish:
    - Use the synthesized JSON-string scalar fields for structured handler results.
    - 'delegation intake captured for this program: {"cms_publish":{"service":"cms","webhook":"mock publishing endpoint"}}.'
  editorial_review:
    - Use the synthesized JSON-string scalar fields for structured handler results.
    - 'delegation intake captured for this program: {"cms_publish":{"service":"cms","webhook":"mock publishing endpoint"}}.'
control_plane:
  version: 1
  session:
    program: content-publishing
    binding: identity_channel_program
    concurrency:
      policy: single_active
      on_busy: reject_with_status
  free_text:
    control: ask
    bind:
      query: $text
  controls:
    ask:
      title: Ask
      aliases:
        - /ask
      args:
        query:
          type: string
          required: true
          capture: rest
      dispatch:
        - op: create_session
          as: session
          program: content-publishing
          domain_context:
            query: $args.query
        - op: trigger
          session: $session.id
          channel: user_text
          payload: $args.query
          mode: async
    abort:
      title: Abort run
      aliases:
        - /abort
        - /stop
      availability:
        when: active_session.running
      dispatch:
        - op: abort_session
          session: $active_session.id
      presentation:
        priority: destructive
        confirm: true
    new:
      title: New session
      aliases:
        - /new
        - /reset
        - /restart
      dispatch:
        - op: create_session
          as: session
          program: content-publishing
      presentation:
        priority: secondary
    history:
      title: Recent sessions
      aliases:
        - /history
        - /recent
      dispatch:
        - op: list_sessions
          as: sessions
      presentation:
        priority: secondary
    status:
      title: Status
      aliases:
        - /status
      availability:
        when: active_session
      dispatch:
        - op: render_session
          session: $active_session.id
          view: status
      presentation:
        priority: contextual
    resume:
      title: Resume
      aliases:
        - /resume
      availability:
        when: active_session
      dispatch:
        - op: send_runtime_control
          session: $active_session.id
          control: resume
      presentation:
        priority: contextual
    help:
      title: Help
      aliases:
        - /help
      dispatch:
        - op: render_help
      presentation:
        priority: secondary
